pitchEn: A casual arcade game where you help a gardener pick all the cucumbers before the moles get them across 10 levels. A light, offline single-player challenge with a growing timer-hole mechanic.
newFeaturesEn: First release: 10 levels of cucumber-picking arcade fun with racing moles and a shrinking-hole timer, playable fully offline.

dataHandling.notes: Fully offline game. No network, no hardware permissions, no accounts. Only local game settings/progress are kept on the device.

reviewerRemarksEn: No account, login or internet connection is needed. Launch the app, choose a language on first run, and tap Start to play. Collect the cucumbers before the moles reach them and advance through the 10 levels. Everything runs offline on the device.
